TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nikol_Pashinyan, title = Nikol_Pashinyan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nikol_Pashinyan} }

S.FORM: Nikol Pashinyan ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 6, Nikol Pashinyan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1975) mrhuw Armenia ta' misuw hya' ga Nikol Pashinyan, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1975 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Nikol Pashinyan ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 6, Nikol Pashinyan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1975) mrhuw Armenia ta' misuw hya' ga Nikol Pashinyan, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1975 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: nikol pas~ɕħinjan rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, nikol pas~ɕħinjan, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw armenia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa nikol pas~ɕħinjan, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
